hooks.command: dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:]  | join("/")'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave is done'
dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:]  | join("/")'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave has a question for you'
dir=$(cat | jq -r '.cwd | split("/") | .[-2:]  | join("/")'); notify-send -u normal -i dialog-information "Claude Code ($dir)" 'Slave needs your permission'
